label: Mask结构
description: 原样透传 grid，并在节点下方以圆点黑白 mask 预览：0 为黑色、非 0 为白色圆点。用于调试、检查网格 mask 形状。
description-en: Pass grid through unchanged and preview a black/white dot mask below the node: 0 renders black, non-zero renders white dots. Useful for inspecting grid masks.

inputs.name: grid
inputs.label: grid
inputs.description: 输入 grid；将被原样透传，并在 UI 中展示黑白 mask
inputs.description-en: Input grid; passed through unchanged and rendered as a dot mask.

outputs.name: grid
outputs.label: grid
outputs.description: 与输入完全一致的 grid
outputs.description-en: The same grid as the input.
